moleculeScope: Lidocaine reference graph and manually enumerated, chemically sanitized benchmark analogues.

scientificLabels.graphProperties: Computed locally by RDKit from bundled SMILES.
scientificLabels.logP: RDKit Crippen calculated LogP; heuristic, not experimental.
scientificLabels.similarity: Morgan radius-2 2048-bit fingerprint with Tanimoto metric.
scientificLabels.conformers: RDKit ETKDGv3 with MMFF94 when parameterized, otherwise UFF.
scientificLabels.groundTruth: Deterministic utility defined by scoring-profile.json and independently recalculated during evaluation.
